prinsurf 2.0
  • Get started
  • Reference

    Plot a principal-surface biplot

    plot.prinsurf.Rd

    Draws the sample coordinates with calibrated gradient-flow axes for the monotone variables. Variables that are deferred (interior extremum or low coverage) are not drawn as axes; pass their names to contours to overlay their contour lines instead.

    # S3 method for class 'prinsurf'
plot(
  x,
  vars = NULL,
  group = NULL,
  contours = NULL,
  col_axis = "grey25",
  pch = 16,
  cex = 0.7,
  defer = TRUE,
  cover_min = 0.55,
  delta = 0.05,
  ...
)

    Arguments

    x

    A "prinsurf" object.

    vars

    Variables to draw axes for (default: all).

    group

    Optional factor to colour the sample points.

    contours

    Optional variable name(s) whose contour lines to overlay.

    col_axis

    Colour for the axes.

    pch, cex

    Point symbol and size for samples.

    ...

    Passed to the initial plot.

    Value

    Invisibly, a character vector of the variables that were deferred.

    Contents

    Developed by Raeesa Ganey.
